Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.soop

Interface SOOPChatEventListener

public interface SOOPChatEventListener
Event listener for SOOP chat and donation events.

Callbacks are invoked on internal WebSocket/network threads. Avoid long blocking work inside callbacks.

Since:
1.0.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    onBroadcastEnd(SOOPChat chat)
    Called when the broadcast is determined to be ended.
    default void
    onChat(String userId, String username, String message)
    Called when a chat message is received.
    default void
    onConnect(SOOPChat chat, boolean isReconnecting)
    Called after a WebSocket connection is established.
    default void
    onConnectionClosed(int code, String reason, boolean remote, boolean tryingToReconnect)
    Called when the connection is closed.
    default void
    onDonation(SOOPChat chat, SOOPDonationMessage msg)
    Called when a donation event is received.
    default void
    onError(Exception ex)
    Called when an exception occurs in connection or parsing flow.
    default void
    onMission(SOOPChat chat, SOOPMissionEvent event)
    Called when a mission event payload is received.
    default void
    onNewSubscribe(SOOPChat chat, String userId, String nickname, int duration)
    Called when a new subscription starts.
    default void
    onSubscribe(SOOPChat chat, String from, String fromUsername, int monthCount, int tier)
    Called when a subscription continuation event is received.
    default void
    onSubscriptionGift(SOOPChat chat, String gifterUserId, String gifterNickname, String recipientUserId, String recipientNickname, int months)
    Called when a subscription gift event is received.
    default void
    onUnhandledPacket(String typeCode, String[] fields)
    Called when an unhandled packet type is received.

  • Method Details

    • onConnect

      default void onConnect(SOOPChat chat, boolean isReconnecting)
      Called after a WebSocket connection is established.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      chat - active SOOP chat client
      isReconnecting - true if this connection is a reconnect

    • onChat

      default void onChat(String userId, String username, String message)
      Called when a chat message is received.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      userId - sender user ID
      username - sender display name
      message - chat message text

    • onDonation

      default void onDonation(SOOPChat chat, SOOPDonationMessage msg)
      Called when a donation event is received.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      chat - active SOOP chat client
      msg - parsed donation message payload

    • onSubscribe

      default void onSubscribe(SOOPChat chat, String from, String fromUsername, int monthCount, int tier)
      Called when a subscription continuation event is received.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      chat - active SOOP chat client
      from - subscriber user ID
      fromUsername - subscriber display name
      monthCount - continuous subscription months
      tier - subscription tier level

    • onNewSubscribe

      default void onNewSubscribe(SOOPChat chat, String userId, String nickname, int duration)
      Called when a new subscription starts.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      chat - active SOOP chat client
      userId - subscriber user ID
      nickname - subscriber display name
      duration - subscription duration value from SOOP payload

    • onSubscriptionGift

      default void onSubscriptionGift(SOOPChat chat, String gifterUserId, String gifterNickname, String recipientUserId, String recipientNickname, int months)
      Called when a subscription gift event is received.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      chat - active SOOP chat client
      gifterUserId - gifter user ID
      gifterNickname - gifter display name
      recipientUserId - recipient user ID
      recipientNickname - recipient display name
      months - gifted subscription months

    • onMission

      default void onMission(SOOPChat chat, SOOPMissionEvent event)
      Called when a mission event payload is received.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      chat - active SOOP chat client
      event - parsed mission event data

    • onConnectionClosed

      default void onConnectionClosed(int code, String reason, boolean remote, boolean tryingToReconnect)
      Called when the connection is closed.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      code - close status code
      reason - close reason message
      remote - true if closure was initiated remotely
      tryingToReconnect - true if reconnect logic will run

    • onBroadcastEnd

      default void onBroadcastEnd(SOOPChat chat)
      Called when the broadcast is determined to be ended.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      chat - active SOOP chat client

    • onUnhandledPacket

      default void onUnhandledPacket(String typeCode, String[] fields)
      Called when an unhandled packet type is received.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      typeCode - packet type code
      fields - packet payload fields split by SOOP separator

    • onError

      default void onError(Exception ex)
      Called when an exception occurs in connection or parsing flow.

      Invoked on an internal WebSocket callback thread.

      Parameters:
      ex - raised exception
